## UpdateAddressInput variable

Zod schema for updating an existing address. All fields are optional for partial updates.

**Signature:**

```typescript
UpdateAddressInput: z.ZodObject<
	{
		line1: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodString>>
		line2: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodNullable<z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodString>>>
		>
		city: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'City'>>>
		unit: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodString>>
		postalCode: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'PostalCode'>>
		>
		country: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodString>>
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		line1?: string | undefined
		city?: (string & z.BRAND<'City'>) | undefined
		unit?: string | undefined
		postalCode?: (string & z.BRAND<'PostalCode'>) | undefined
		country?: string | undefined
		line2?: string | null | undefined
	},
	{
		line1?: string | undefined
		city?: string | undefined
		unit?: string | undefined
		postalCode?: string | undefined
		country?: string | undefined
		line2?: string | null | undefined
	}
>
```
